title: Chief Operating Officer (Operations Leadership | Education Services)
description:
Strategic & Operational Leadership

  • Partner with senior leadership to execute organisational strategy and growth initiatives
  • Translate business goals into clear operational plans, KPIs, and execution frameworks
  • Drive operational efficiency, scalability, and service quality

Group Operations Management

  • Oversee core operational functions including admissions, student services, corporate services, compliance, and internal systems
  • Establish, standardise, and continuously improve operating procedures (SOPs)
  • Support operational improvements across education programmes and services

Governance, Risk & Compliance

  • Ensure compliance with applicable regulatory and quality assurance frameworks
  • Oversee risk management, internal controls, and governance processes
  • Support management reporting and policy implementation

People & Culture Leadership

  • Lead, mentor, and develop a high-performing management team
  • Foster a professional, accountable, and performance-driven culture
  • Support workforce planning, leadership development, and succession planning

Stakeholder Engagement

  • Manage relationships with institutional partners and key external stakeholders
  • Represent the organisation in senior-level discussions and partnerships
  • Strengthen organisational reputation and service delivery standards

Cross-Border & Multi-Entity Operations

  • Support operations across multiple business units and geographies
  • Ensure alignment, communication, and governance across teams

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in a relevant discipline (e.g. Business, Management, Education, or related fields)
  • Experience within education, international education services, or related professional services
  • Proven track record in managing complex, multi-function operations
  • Strong capability in building systems, improving processes, and scaling organisations
  • Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and decision-making skills
  • Strong communication skills and a hands-on leadership approach


Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com



EA License No.: 13C6305


Reg. No.: R23117344 (Tiong Tian Ho)



For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
